name: COLONIC ATRESIA
dominant_finding: dilated hyperechoic distal small bowel + proximal colon ← retained meconium
discriminating_features: massive dilatation of colon proximal to obstruction
mottled pattern of gas + feces proximal to point of atresia
obstruction to retrograde flow of barium
dilated hyperechoic distal small bowel + proximal colon ← retained meconium

general: massive dilatation of colon proximal to obstruction
mottled pattern of gas + feces proximal to point of atresia
obstruction to retrograde flow of barium
US: dilated hyperechoic distal small bowel + proximal colon ← retained meconium
